economic_notes: Attawapiskat Enterprises comprises multiple entities including Resources Inc., Limited Partnership, Catering Limited Partnership, Catering Inc., Advanced Security Limited Partnership, Security Inc., Rentals Limited Partnership, and Gord's Rental Inc. Attawapiskat Power Corporation also accounted for on modified equity basis.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED because the financial statements do not present a comparison of results for the accounting period with those originally planned (budget figures not included), which is a departure from Canadian public sector accounting standards per Note 19. This qualification also existed in the prior year 2022. Consolidated entities include: Attawapiskat First Nation Band, Education Authority, Maytawaywin Authority (Arena Gymnasium), Development Corporation, and Health Services Board (no activity). GBEs on modified equity basis: Attawapiskat Power Corporation and Attawapiskat Enterprises (multiple sub-entities). ISC funding calculated as Fixed + Grant + Flexible + Prior year adjustments = 31962595+1271914+5418802+15627. Total government transfers includes ISC + FNIHB + CMHC + Nishnawbe Aski + Province of Ontario. Remuneration schedule not included in provided pages.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
